claim_boundary: Calibration rows are analysis-only and diagnostic; no navigation, safety, human-realism, paper-facing, or dissertation claim is supported.

notes: Rows are stratified by scenario family, observation tier, baseline/predictor family, horizon, semantic metadata availability, and actor-class availability.
Actor class is unavailable in the source comparison rows, so otherwise calibrated rows remain diagnostic-only for forecast-risk scoring.
Bottleneck and crossing_proxy rows retain zero-denominator limitations.
